worked_example_ref.problem_statement_digest: SpanningTreeIterator raised an AttributeError when next() was called directly without first calling iter() — the iterator state (partition queue) was initialized in __iter__ rather than __init__, so a bare next() hit an uninitialized attribute. Initialize state so next() works without an explicit iter().

lesson_body: Iterator protocol does not require __iter__ to be called before __next__, so lazy initialization placed only in __iter__ leaves the object in an invalid state for direct next() calls. Initialize all mutable state to a sentinel value at construction, then perform lazy setup on first use inside __next__.
